mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO delivery_fees ( order_number, platform, shipping_included, total_delivery_fee, unit_price, shipping_count, order_date ) VALUES
( #{item.orderNumber}, #{item.platform}, #{item.shippingIncluded}, #{item.totalDeliveryFee}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.shippingCount}, #{item.orderDate} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE order_number = order_number

INSERT INTO delivery_fees ( order_number, platform, shipping_included, total_delivery_fee, unit_price, shipping_count, order_date ) VALUES ( #{orderNumber}, #{platform}, #{shippingIncluded}, #{totalDeliveryFee}, #{unitPrice}, #{shippingCount}, #{orderDate} )
